parameters.subject: =🚀 New LINE Lead: {{ $('Parse LINE Data').item.json.displayName || $('Parse LINE Data').item.json.firstName }} ({{ $('Parse LINE Data').item.json.program }})

parameters.fileContent: =# LINE Message  **Date**: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') }} **User**: {{ $('Get LINE Profile').item.json.displayName }} **Source**: LINE HASSE @nhe2702g  ---  {{ $json.messageText }}  ---  #line #hasse #auto-logged

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ replyToken: $json.replyToken, messages: $json.messages }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify($json.aiBody) }}
